name: Random/Complex Payload
description: Packet with arbitrary mix of payload bytes testing diverse data patterns. Tests CRC robustness across all byte values.
purpose: General correctness verification: algorithm works for arbitrary payload patterns

crc_coverage.description: Header through Payload (16-byte payload with mixed values)

input.description: Header=0x55AA, Seq=0x04, Cmd=0x60 (STATUS_GET_ALL), Len=0x0010, Payload=[diverse bytes]

payload_details.pattern_description: Mix of all zeros, all ones, frame header bytes, reserved bytes, and arbitrary values

expected_complete_packet.description: Complete packet bytes including CRC and footer
expected_complete_packet.structure: Header(2) + Seq(1) + Cmd(1) + Len(2) + Payload(16) + CRC(2) + Footer(1) = 25 bytes total

testing_notes: Tests CRC computation on packets with diverse data patterns
Includes edge cases: 0x00, 0xFF, repeated bytes, frame header bytes in payload
Verifies algorithm handles all byte values correctly
Ensures CRC is robust, not sensitive to specific patterns
Integration test: verify daemon and firmware both produce identical CRC for this vector

why_this_pattern.rationale: The payload includes deliberate diversity to test edge cases
includes: Frame header bytes (0x55, 0xAA) appearing in payload - verifies CRC processes them correctly
Boundary values (0x00 min, 0xFF max, 0x80 high bit)
